title: June 18
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 18''' is the 169th day of the year (170th in leap years). There are 196 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1938|1938]] – [[Michael Sheard]] is born.
*[[1940s#1942|1942]] – [[Nick Tate]] is born.
*[[1940s#1944|1944]] – [[Colin Skeaping]] is born.
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Keith Swaden]] is born.
*[[1950s#1956|1956]] – [[Alan Davis]] is born.
*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Ralph Brown]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Rick Famuyiwa]] is born.
*[[1985]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 99|''Star Wars'' (1977) 99]] published.
*[[1997]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 1]] published.
*[[2008]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 30|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 30]] published.
*2008 – [[Legacy (2006) 25|''Legacy'' (2006) 25]] published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[The Old Republic, Blood of the Empire Act 2: The Broken World]]'' starts publishing [http://www.swtor.com online].
*[[2014]] – [[Darth Maul—Son of Dathomir 2|''Darth Maul—Son of Dathomir'' 2]] published.
*[[2015]] – ''[[Star Wars: Heroes Path]]'' released.
*2015 – ''[[Desperate Allies]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Star Wars: Force and Destiny Beginner Game]]'' published.
*2015 – ''[[Lure of the Lost]]'' published online.
*[[2019]] – [[Solo: A Star Wars Story Adaptation (TPB)|''Solo: A Star Wars Story Adaptation'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2021]] – "[[Reunion]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*[[2024]] – ''[[A New Dawn (novel)]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*2024 – ''[[Catalyst: A Rogue One Novel]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*2024 – ''[[Dark Disciple]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*2024 – [[Rogue One: A Star Wars Story (novelization)|''Rogue One: A Star Wars Story'']] reprinted in paperback.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars: Hyperspace Stories Volume 3 – Light and Shadows]]'' published.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Old Republic Vol. 1]]'' reprinted.
*2024 – "[[Day (episode)|Day]]" airs on Disney+.
*[[2025]] – [[Doctor Aphra – Chaos Agent 1|''Doctor Aphra – Chaos Agent'' 1]] published.
